cards.name: The Fool
cards.upright: a fresh branch leaps without looking; the journey begins.
cards.reversed: recklessness; a leap into untested waters.

cards.name: The Magician
cards.upright: tools aligned; the author bends the diff to their will.
cards.reversed: trickery; clever code that hides its purpose.

cards.name: The High Priestess
cards.upright: hidden knowledge in the codebase whispers approval.
cards.reversed: secrets withheld; documentation conceals more than it reveals.

cards.name: The Empress
cards.upright: the diff births new features in fertile soil.
cards.reversed: feature bloat; growth without root.

cards.name: The Emperor
cards.upright: architecture holds; the lint gods are appeased.
cards.reversed: rigid abstractions strangle the change.

cards.name: The Hierophant
cards.upright: convention honored; the style guide nods.
cards.reversed: heresy against the established patterns.

cards.name: The Lovers
cards.upright: two modules meet in harmony; an integration blessed.
cards.reversed: coupling without consent; tangled dependencies.

cards.name: The Chariot
cards.upright: the change races forward; CI yields its laurel.
cards.reversed: velocity without direction; a runaway refactor.

cards.name: Strength
cards.upright: the suite endures the new load with grace.
cards.reversed: fragile resolve; a single edge case shatters all.

cards.name: The Hermit
cards.upright: a quiet refactor lit by a single lamp.
cards.reversed: isolation; this PR has not seen another set of eyes.

cards.name: Wheel of Fortune
cards.upright: the wheel turns; flaky tests may finally pass.
cards.reversed: regression returns; what was fixed is broken anew.

cards.name: Justice
cards.upright: the diff is balanced; tests match implementation.
cards.reversed: unbalanced trade-offs; technical debt is being levied.

cards.name: The Hanged Man
cards.upright: a deliberate pause; a bold inversion of approach.
cards.reversed: stalled work; this PR is suspended needlessly.

cards.name: Death
cards.upright: old code dies so a cleaner form may rise.
cards.reversed: an ending resisted; deprecated code clings on.

cards.name: Temperance
cards.upright: old and new are blended with care.
cards.reversed: over-correction; a swing too far from the previous design.

cards.name: The Devil
cards.upright: a quick hack chains future maintainers.
cards.reversed: release; an old shortcut is finally severed.

cards.name: The Tower
cards.upright: a load-bearing assumption topples — beware.
cards.reversed: narrowly avoided collapse; a near-miss outage.

cards.name: The Star
cards.upright: clear intent shines; reviewers will trust this work.
cards.reversed: false hope; the patch only appears to fix the issue.

cards.name: The Moon
cards.upright: shadows in the diff — something is not what it seems.
cards.reversed: confusion lifts; a hidden bug surfaces and is named.

cards.name: The Sun
cards.upright: the build is green; the path forward shines.
cards.reversed: false dawn; green CI hides a brittle truth.

cards.name: Judgement
cards.upright: the reviewer is roused; a verdict approaches.
cards.reversed: reckoning postponed; this PR will linger in queue.

cards.name: The World
cards.upright: the cycle closes; this change is ready to ship.
cards.reversed: almost done — one loose thread keeps the world from turning.
